title: Improper Restriction of Excessive Authentication Attempts

references.description: Improper Restriction of Excessive Authentication Attempts
Authentication and access control measures requiring protection against excessive authentication attempts.
references.condition: The entity is an essential or important entity subject to NIS2

references.description: ICT risk management protection and prevention controls requiring rate-limiting on authentication endpoints.
references.condition: The affected system is part of the ICT infrastructure of a financial entity subject to DORA

references.description: Secure authentication controls requiring lockout or rate-limiting after repeated failed attempts.
